explanations.overview: <form> wraps controls and can be submitted to a server.

byOptionId.form: Correct â€” <form> groups inputs and submission behavior.

byOptionId.input: Incorrect â€” <input> is a control inside a form, not the form container.
byOptionId.label: Incorrect â€” <label> labels a control but isn't the form container.

explanations.overview: Labels supporten Screen-Reader fett und erlauben klares Text-Klicken, um das Control heftig zu fokussieren.

byOptionId.access: Correct â€” <label> improves accessibility and focus behavior.
byOptionId.style: Incorrect â€” styling is done via CSS, not the label element itself.
byOptionId.submit: Incorrect â€” <label> does not submit forms automatically.
byOptionId.none: Incorrect â€” labels provide accessibility benefits and should be used.
